name: EdwCmsMbrEnrStoredProc

text.value: WITH cte_rowgen AS (SELECT 1 AS SUB_MBR_SK), cte_transform AS (SELECT '@{pipeline().parameters.BeginExtrDate}' AS MBR_ENR_EFF_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EndExtrDate}' AS MBR_ENR_TERM_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.BeginExtrDate}' AS FLTR_BGN_DT, '@{pipeline().parameters.EndExtrDate}' AS FLTR_END_DT, '@{pipeline().parameters.State}' AS STATE, 'Y' AS VALUE, CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS SUB_INDV_KEY, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(50)) AS QHP_ID FROM cte_rowgen) SELECT * FROM cte_transform
